news.title:
Shyam Metalics shows mixed sales trends with YoY and MoM volume dips in Aluminium Foil and Pellet.
Significant YoY volume surges observed in Pig Iron and CR Coil Sheets; realizations increased overall.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics shows mixed sales trends with YoY and MoM volume dips in Aluminium Foil and Pellet.
Significant YoY volume surges observed in Pig Iron and CR Coil Sheets; realizations increased overall.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics informed about its investor/analyst meeting at Nuvama India Conference 2026.
Discussions were based on publicly available data, with no UPSI disclosed.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics informed about its investor/analyst meeting at Nuvama India Conference 2026.

news.title: Shyam Metalics reports a 5.4% YoY drop in January stainless steel sales.
news.summary: Shyam Metalics reports a 5.4% YoY drop in January stainless steel sales.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics saw YoY drop in Stainless Steel sales (-5.4%) but realizations rose 11.4%.
Pellet sales surged 42.1% YoY; Pig Iron sales grew 347.9%, with realizations up 6.2%.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics saw YoY drop in Stainless Steel sales (-5.4%) but realizations rose 11.4%.
Pellet sales surged 42.1% YoY; Pig Iron sales grew 347.9%, with realizations up 6.2%.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics announces analyst/investor meetings on Feb 9-10, 2026, in Mumbai.
Meetings will involve institutional investors, fund managers, and share publicly available information.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics announces analyst/investor meetings on Feb 9-10, 2026, in Mumbai.
Meetings will involve institutional investors, fund managers, and share publicly available information.

news.title: Shyam Metalics plans Rs. 6,660 Cr CAPEX to boost capacity and diversify portfolio by 2031.
news.summary: Shyam Metalics plans Rs. 6,660 Cr CAPEX to boost capacity and diversify portfolio by 2031.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics announces audio recording of Q3 and 9M FY26 results conference call.
Recording is accessible on the company's website as per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics announces audio recording of Q3 and 9M FY26 results conference call.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics Q3 net profit at 1.97B, slightly down from 1.98B YoY.
Q3 revenue surged to 44.2B from 37.56B YoY, showcasing strong sales growth.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics Q3 net profit at 1.97B, slightly down from 1.98B YoY.
Q3 revenue surged to 44.2B from 37.56B YoY, showcasing strong sales growth.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics approved Q3 unaudited results, voluntary liquidation of Dubai subsidiary.
Company plans Rs 6,660 crore capex for new projects and appointed a director for 5 years.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics approved Q3 unaudited results, voluntary liquidation of Dubai subsidiary.
Company plans Rs 6,660 crore capex for new projects and appointed a director for 5 years.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics schedules an investor conference call on 27th Jan 2026 at 4 PM IST to discuss Q3 and 9M FY26 results.
Management participants include Chairman Brij Bhushan Agarwal and CFO Deepak Agarwal, with IR contact details provided.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics schedules an investor conference call on 27th Jan 2026 at 4 PM IST to discuss Q3 and 9M FY26 results.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics executed an NSE block trade for 222,053 shares at Rs. 812.75.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 18.05 crore.
news.summary:

news.title:
Shyam Metalics reports stainless steel sales up 19.1% YoY; realizations up 18.2%.
Speciality alloys volumes rose 50.1% YoY; aluminium foil volumes fell 4.7% YoY.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics reports stainless steel sales up 19.1% YoY; realizations up 18.2%.
Speciality alloys volumes rose 50.1% YoY; aluminium foil volumes fell 4.7% YoY.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics to hold analyst/investor meetings on Dec 18-19, 2025.
Meetings will be group sessions at plant locations in Jamuria and Pakuria, WB.
news.summary:

news.title:
Shyam Metalics shows growth in pellets, pig iron, and CR sheets for November.
Prices for sponge iron and carbon steel faced downward pressure.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics shows growth in pellets, pig iron, and CR sheets for November.
Prices for sponge iron and carbon steel faced downward pressure.

news.title:
Shyam Metalics reports 7.5% YoY rise in stainless steel sales; pellet sales surge 131.1% YoY.
Aluminium foil sales drop 4.6% YoY but up 40.7% MoM; blast furnace steady post Nov. 24 commissioning.
news.summary:
Shyam Metalics reports 7.5% YoY rise in stainless steel sales; pellet sales surge 131.1% YoY.
Aluminium foil sales drop 4.6% YoY but up 40.7% MoM; blast furnace steady post Nov. 24 commissioning.

news.title:
Jefferies rates Shyam Metalics 'Buy' with a target of ₹1050, indicating a 25% upside.
Firm is a top 3 stainless steel producer, showing strong volume growth driving EPS and EBITDA CAGR.
news.summary:
Jefferies rates Shyam Metalics 'Buy' with a target of ₹1050, indicating a 25% upside.
Firm is a top 3 stainless steel producer, showing strong volume growth driving EPS and EBITDA CAGR.

news.title:

The firm shows strong ROE and capital structure despite low profit-interest ratio.
